# Tavo

> Tavo is a free, open-source browser extension that gives you per-tab volume control (0–400%), one-click tab muting, per-tab microphone mute, and per-tab webcam toggle for any playing audio, video, or WebRTC call in Chrome, Edge, Brave, and other Chromium browsers.

Tavo runs entirely on-device. Every tab remembers its own volume, mute, mic, and camera settings for the session, and state survives reloads and navigation via `chrome.storage.session`. Built on Manifest V3 and the native `chrome.tabs` muting API; volume scaling uses a per-tab Web Audio gain graph. No tracking, no external servers, no account.

The extension is open source under the MIT license. The full source code, issue tracker, and releases live on GitHub.

## Feature Pages

- [Volume Booster](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/volume-booster): Boost any tab's audio up to 400% beyond the site's default using a per-tab Web Audio GainNode. Useful for quiet YouTube videos, podcasts, and calls.
- [Mute Tab](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/mute-tab): One-click, browser-native tab muting that silences all audio in a tab — including WebRTC streams — without pausing playback.
- [Mic Toggle](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/mic-toggle): Per-tab microphone mute that operates on the page's getUserStream tracks, isolating one tab without affecting system mic or other calls.
- [Webcam Toggle](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/webcam-toggle): Disable the camera track for the active tab only, leaving other tabs and apps unaffected.
- [Media Controller](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/media-controller): Single popup that exposes volume, mute, mic, and webcam controls for every open tab.
- [Features](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/features): Full feature overview, including per-tab badges, iframe coverage, and session persistence.

## Learn More

- [FAQ](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/faq): Common questions about Tavo — how it differs from Chrome's native mute, WebRTC support, privacy, and supported browsers.
- [Help](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/help): Installation, usage, and troubleshooting guide.
- [Changelog](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/changelog): Release history and notable changes.
- [About](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/about): The story behind Tavo and the developer.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/tonmoydeb404/tavo): Full source code, issues, and pull requests.
- [Chrome Web Store Listing](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/tavo): Install Tavo from the Chrome Web Store.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/privacy): Tavo runs on-device, stores state in `chrome.storage.session`, and does not collect, transmit, or sell any data.
- [Terms](https://tavo.tonmoydeb.com/terms): Terms of use for the Tavo extension and website.
